## Checklist

- [ ] I read `AGENTS.md` and `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I edited `src/data/course.js` for content changes (not hardcoded into components).
- [ ] I did not add new colors, gradients, or dependencies.
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint` — clean.
- [ ] I ran `npm run build` — clean.
- [ ] I tested the affected page in `npm run dev`.
- [ ] I added a screenshot for any UI change.
